title: Principal
description: Off-chain registry entity; hash-anchored on-chain (§5.1). The legal person or business behind one or more agents.

verification_tier.description: KYC/KYB tier; see params.tiers T0-T3 for verify method and per_pool/monthly caps.

ubo_cluster_id.description: Beneficial-owner cluster identifier (private). The envelope unit for caps, reputation, and insurance-payout linkage checks (params.identity).

kyb_providers.description: KYB provider identifiers that screened this principal; multi-provider quorum required at T3 (params.tiers.T3).

result.description: Screening result code (implementation-defined, e.g. clear/flagged/blocked). OFAC/UN/EU screening is fail-closed and strict-liability per params.compliance.

per_pool.description: Maximum exposure per pool, USDC 6-decimal base units, string-encoded integer. See params.tiers for tier defaults.

monthly.description: Maximum monthly exposure, USDC 6-decimal base units, string-encoded integer.
